hero.subtitle: Bridge the gap between manufacture safety and consumer confidence. Instantly scan, verify ingredients, track expiration, and maintain batch authenticity.

howItWorks.label: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: From manufacturer to consumer — a seamless flow of product transparency.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Manufacturers enter product details — name, batch number, dates, and safety instructions — through a clean dashboard.
howItWorks.step2Desc: A unique QR code is generated for each batch. Download it, print it, and attach it to your packaging.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Consumers scan the QR with their phone. Product details, expiry status, and voice readout — instantly.

features.label: Capabilities
features.subtitle: A complete ecosystem connecting manufacturers with consumers through smart, accessible technology.
features.f1Desc: Instantly verify product authenticity and batch details by scanning the QR code.
features.f2Desc: Tap the voice button to hear product details spoken aloud. Designed for elderly and visually challenged users.
features.f3Desc: Real-time expiry calculation with color-coded status — Safe, Expiring Soon, or Expired.
features.f4Desc: Built on Azure Cosmos DB with serverless functions. Lightning-fast lookups with enterprise security.
features.f5Desc: Full batch-level traceability — know who made it, when, and when it expires.
features.f6Desc: A powerful yet simple dashboard to manage products, generate QR codes, and track lifecycles.

forConsumers.label: For Consumers
forConsumers.heading: Designed for everyone. Especially those who need it most.
forConsumers.subtitle: We built SmartQR with accessibility at its core — because product safety is a right, not a privilege.
forConsumers.p1Desc: Tap the speaker button to hear all product details spoken aloud. Perfect for visually challenged and elderly users.
forConsumers.p2Desc: Big buttons, clear text, color-coded badges. No tiny fonts, no confusing layouts.
forConsumers.p3Desc: No login required. Just scan and know. Works on any phone with a camera.

forManufacturers.label: For Manufacturers
forManufacturers.heading: Build trust with every product you ship.
forManufacturers.subtitle: Small and medium manufacturers can onboard in minutes. Upload details, generate smart QR labels, and give your customers confidence.
forManufacturers.b1Desc: Upload product details through a simple form. No technical expertise required.
forManufacturers.b2Desc: Get a unique, printable QR code for each product batch automatically.
forManufacturers.b3Desc: Print QR labels and attach to any packaging — tablets, bottles, cosmetics.
forManufacturers.b4Desc: Increase transparency and brand credibility. Consumers verify your product instantly.

cta.subtitle: Join the movement for product transparency. Whether you manufacture or consume — SmartQR has you covered.

faq.heading: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: SmartQR is a product transparency platform that connects manufacturers with consumers through intelligent QR codes. Each QR code is linked to real-time product data — including batch details, manufacturing dates, and expiry information — so consumers can instantly verify authenticity and safety.
faq.q2: Is SmartQR free to use for consumers?
faq.a2: Yes, scanning and verifying products through SmartQR is completely free for consumers. Simply scan any SmartQR-enabled product label to instantly access batch details, expiry status, and safety information — no account or registration required.
faq.a3: SmartQR calculates the real-time expiry status of every product by comparing its manufacturing date, shelf life, and the current date. Products are color-coded as Safe (green), Expiring Soon (amber), or Expired (red), giving you an instant visual indicator of product safety.
faq.q4: Can I use SmartQR for my manufacturing business?
faq.a4: Absolutely. SmartQR provides a dedicated Manufacturer Portal where you can register your products, create batches, generate branded QR codes, and track product lifecycles — all from a single, easy-to-use dashboard. It is built on Azure Cloud for enterprise-grade reliability.
faq.q5: What is the voice accessibility feature?
faq.a5: SmartQR includes a built-in text-to-speech feature that reads product details aloud when you tap the voice button. This is designed specifically for elderly users and people with visual impairments, ensuring product safety information is accessible to everyone.
faq.q6: How secure is the data on SmartQR?
faq.a6: All data is stored on Azure Cosmos DB with enterprise-level encryption and security. Manufacturer accounts are protected with JWT-based authentication, and all API communication is encrypted end-to-end. We never share your data with third parties.

footer.tagline: Smart product transparency and expiry intelligence for everyone.
footer.madeIn: Designed for accessibility. Made in India.

scanner.title: Scan Product
scanner.subtitle: Scan a QR code or barcode to instantly check safety and expiry status.
scanner.readyDesc: Scan a QR code using your camera or upload an image from your gallery.
scanner.cameraWarning: Camera not available — please allow camera permission.
scanner.step2Desc: Retail barcodes don't contain expiry dates. To verify safety, please enter the batch ID or expiry date printed on the box, or snap a photo of it.
scanner.pointCamera: Point your camera at the Batch/Expiry text
scanner.name: Name
scanner.statusSafeMsg: This product is fresh and safe to use.
scanner.statusExpiringMsg: Use caution. This product will expire soon.
scanner.statusExpiredMsg: Warning: This product has passed its expiry date.

productDetail.speechSafe: safe to use with {days} days remaining
productDetail.speechExpiring: expiring soon with only {days} days remaining
productDetail.speechExpired: expired {days} days ago. Do not consume.

about.heading: The story behind SmartQR
about.intro: It started with a simple observation: when you tear a tablet strip, the expiry date is lost. Later, it becomes impossible to know if those remaining tablets are still safe. This happens in millions of Indian households every day.
about.problemHeading: Expiry dates shouldn't disappear when packaging tears.
about.problemDesc: Existing barcodes on medicine strips only contain a product ID — not batch-level expiry data. There is no complete public Indian medicine database with this information. And for elderly or non-literate users, even reading the tiny printed dates is a challenge.
about.problemPoint1: Tablet strip tears — expiry date is gone
about.problemPoint2: Elderly can't read tiny print on labels
about.problemPoint3: Patients managing 5-6 medicines daily get confused
about.problemPoint4: Rural and non-literate users can't read English labels
about.solutionDesc: We connect manufacturers with consumers through smart QR codes that carry batch-level product information — accessible to everyone, including those who can't read.
about.v1Desc: Every feature we build starts with one question: does this make products safer for consumers?
about.v2Desc: Voice readout, large text, clear colors — designed for elderly, visually challenged, and non-literate users.
about.v3Desc: We believe consumers deserve to know exactly what they are using — manufacturer, batch, dates, and safety instructions.
about.v4Desc: From small-scale manufacturers in rural India to consumers in cities — SmartQR works for all.
about.ctaSubtitle: Scan a product, add your own, or explore the dashboard.
